; Modified: 2026-07-14
;
; Requires: https://github.com/asivery/rm-xovi-extensions

AFFECT [[17298303916558156758]]
    TRAVERSE [[254504370080162629]]
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        INSERT {
            ~&8545339034058226003&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: gestikThreeLeft
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "gestik-three-left"
                ~&233726547792244&~: !~&254549375155946341&~.~&16735792760298061570&~
                ~&254526613107157226&~: ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(-1, 0)
                ~&6503646466&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&7082729686082&~)
                ~&233727659172727&~: 3
                ~&5336243603164651436&~: { ~&5972376&~ (gestikThreeLeft.~&7082453764421&~) { ~&233745975898428&~.regGestikApply("three-left"); } }
            }
            ~&8545339034058226003&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: gestikThreeRight
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "gestik-three-right"
                ~&233726547792244&~: !~&254549375155946341&~.~&16735792760298061570&~
                ~&254526613107157226&~: ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(1, 0)
                ~&6503646466&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&7082729686082&~)
                ~&233727659172727&~: 3
                ~&5336243603164651436&~: { ~&5972376&~ (gestikThreeRight.~&7082453764421&~) { ~&233745975898428&~.regGestikApply("three-right"); } }
            }
            ~&8545339034058226003&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: gestikThreeUp
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "gestik-three-up"
                ~&233726547792244&~: !~&254549375155946341&~.~&16735792760298061570&~
                ~&254526613107157226&~: ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(0, -1)
                ~&6503646466&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&7082729686082&~)
                ~&233727659172727&~: 3
                ~&5336243603164651436&~: { ~&5972376&~ (gestikThreeUp.~&7082453764421&~) { ~&233745975898428&~.regGestikApply("three-up"); } }
            }
            ~&8545339034058226003&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: gestikThreeDown
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "gestik-three-down"
                ~&233726547792244&~: !~&254549375155946341&~.~&16735792760298061570&~
                ~&254526613107157226&~: ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(0, 1)
                ~&6503646466&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&7082729686082&~)
                ~&233727659172727&~: 3
                ~&5336243603164651436&~: { ~&5972376&~ (gestikThreeDown.~&7082453764421&~) { ~&233745975898428&~.regGestikApply("three-down"); } }
            }
            ~&8545339034058226003&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: gestikFourLeft
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "gestik-four-left"
                ~&233726547792244&~: !~&254549375155946341&~.~&16735792760298061570&~
                ~&7712927726759444&~: 2 * ~&254549375155946341&~.~&496707965879903317&~
                ~&254526613107157226&~: ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(-1, 0)
                ~&6503646466&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&7082729686082&~)
                ~&233727659172727&~: 4
                ~&495358363329399331&~: ~&233745975898428&~.regGestikApply("four-left")
            }
            ~&8545339034058226003&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: gestikFourRight
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "gestik-four-right"
                ~&233726547792244&~: !~&254549375155946341&~.~&16735792760298061570&~
                ~&7712927726759444&~: 2 * ~&254549375155946341&~.~&496707965879903317&~
                ~&254526613107157226&~: ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(1, 0)
                ~&6503646466&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&7082729686082&~)
                ~&233727659172727&~: 4
                ~&495358363329399331&~: ~&233745975898428&~.regGestikApply("four-right")
            }
            ~&8545339034058226003&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: gestikFourUp
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "gestik-four-up"
                ~&233726547792244&~: !~&254549375155946341&~.~&16735792760298061570&~
                ~&7712927726759444&~: 2 * ~&254549375155946341&~.~&496707965879903317&~
                ~&254526613107157226&~: ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(0, -1)
                ~&6503646466&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&7082729686082&~)
                ~&233727659172727&~: 4
                ~&495358363329399331&~: ~&233745975898428&~.regGestikApply("four-up")
            }
            ~&8545339034058226003&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: gestikFourDown
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "gestik-four-down"
                ~&233726547792244&~: !~&254549375155946341&~.~&16735792760298061570&~
                ~&7712927726759444&~: 2 * ~&254549375155946341&~.~&496707965879903317&~
                ~&254526613107157226&~: ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(0, 1)
                ~&6503646466&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&7082729686082&~)
                ~&233727659172727&~: 4
                ~&495358363329399331&~: ~&233745975898428&~.regGestikApply("four-down")
            }

            property ~&197102514&~ gestikLassoPrevTool: -1
            ~&8520322697674622449&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: gestikSelectLassoTap
                ~&2593665694115486297&~: ~&254549375155946341&~.~&8672331594786402181&~
                ~&233726547792244&~: !~&254549375155946341&~.~&16735792760298061570&~
                ~&233739427250348&~: {
                    ~&197102514&~ req = new XMLHttpRequest();
                    req.~&6504147419&~("GET", "file:///home/root/.config/gestik.json");
                    req.onreadystatechange = function() {
                        ~&5972376&~ (req.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
                        ~&197102514&~ ~&5972582&~ = ~&6504329801&~;
                        try {
                            ~&197102514&~ parsed = ~&6502785411&~.parse(req.responseText);
                            ~&5972376&~ (parsed && parsed.lassoTap === ~&214625660372&~) { ~&5972582&~ = ~&214625660372&~; }
                        } catch (err) {}
                        ~&5972376&~ (!~&5972582&~) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&7842069035455457876&~.~&8399230650759060099&~ === ~&"254547531013851119&~) {
                            ~&233745975898428&~.gestikExitLasso(gestikLassoPrevTool);
                            gestikLassoPrevTool = -1;
                        } ~&6503784146&~ {
                            ~&233745975898428&~.regGestikExitMode();
                            gestikLassoPrevTool = ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~;
                            ~&233745975898428&~.~&3352491319205423503&~();
                        }
                    };
                    req.~&6504279475&~();
                }
                ~&233727659172727&~: 4
            }

            ~&8545339034058226003&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: gestikFiveUp
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "gestik-five-up"
                ~&233726547792244&~: !~&254549375155946341&~.~&16735792760298061570&~
                ~&7712927726759444&~: 2 * ~&254549375155946341&~.~&496707965879903317&~
                ~&254526613107157226&~: ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(0, -1)
                ~&6503646466&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&7082729686082&~)
                ~&233727659172727&~: 5
                ~&495358363329399331&~: ~&233745975898428&~.regGestikApply("five-up")
            }
            ~&8545339034058226003&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: gestikFiveDown
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "gestik-five-down"
                ~&233726547792244&~: !~&254549375155946341&~.~&16735792760298061570&~
                ~&7712927726759444&~: 2 * ~&254549375155946341&~.~&496707965879903317&~
                ~&254526613107157226&~: ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(0, 1)
                ~&6503646466&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&7082729686082&~)
                ~&233727659172727&~: 5
                ~&495358363329399331&~: ~&233745975898428&~.regGestikApply("five-down")
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[11313888899523275277]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        INSERT {
            property ~&197088788&~ gestikEraserPrevTool: -1

            function regGestikDefaults() {
                ~&7083121450889&~ { "version": 2, "lassoTap": ~&6504329801&~, ~&"7713050416939675&~: {
                    "three-left":  { ~&"7082453764199&~: "17", ~&"214622605608&~: ~&"214621299494&~,  ~&"254549061334391125&~: 1.5 },
                    "three-right": { ~&"7082453764199&~: "15", ~&"214622605608&~: ~&"214621299494&~,  ~&"254549061334391125&~: 2.5 },
                    "three-up":    { ~&"7082453764199&~: "21", ~&"214622605608&~: ~&"214621299494&~,  ~&"254549061334391125&~: 3.0 },
                    "three-down":  { ~&"7082453764199&~: "14", ~&"214622605608&~: ~&"214621299494&~,  ~&"254549061334391125&~: 1.5 },
                    "four-left":   { ~&"7082453764199&~: "18", ~&"214622605608&~: ~&"7083395101253&~, ~&"254549061334391125&~: 1.0 },
                    "four-right":  { ~&"7082453764199&~: "23", ~&"214622605608&~: ~&"6503861980&~,   ~&"254549061334391125&~: 3.0 },
                    "four-up":     { ~&"7082453764199&~: "thickness-up",   ~&"214622605608&~: "keep", ~&"254549061334391125&~: 1.5 },
                    "four-down":   { ~&"7082453764199&~: "thickness-down", ~&"214622605608&~: "keep", ~&"254549061334391125&~: 1.5 },
                    "five-up":     { ~&"7082453764199&~: "overview",       ~&"214622605608&~: "keep", ~&"254549061334391125&~: 1.5 },
                    "five-down":   { ~&"7082453764199&~: "toc",            ~&"214622605608&~: "keep", ~&"254549061334391125&~: 1.5 }
                } };
            }
            function regGestikColorOther(~&6504095402&~) {
                ~&197102514&~ ~&180982&~ = { ~&"214621299494&~: 0, ~&"6503861980&~: 1, ~&"214646069354&~: 2, "blue": 6, ~&"197098276&~: 7, "green": 10, ~&"7083395101253&~: 13, "cyan": 11, "magenta": 12 };
                ~&7083121450889&~ ~&180982&~[~&6504095402&~];
            }
            function regGestikColorHighlighter(~&6504095402&~) {
                ~&197102514&~ ~&180982&~ = { ~&"7083395101253&~: 4294962549, "blue": 4290702078, "orange": 4294951820, "pink": 4294090495, "green": 4289527685, ~&"6503861980&~: 4291282886 };
                ~&7083121450889&~ ~&180982&~[~&6504095402&~];
            }
            function regGestikColorShader(~&6504095402&~) {
                ~&197102514&~ ~&180982&~ = { ~&"6503861980&~: 1075912220, "orange": 1946071552, "magenta": 2160099282, "blue": 1295010528, ~&"197098276&~: 1724002610, "green": 2157042289, ~&"7083395101253&~: 1945823001, "cyan": 1718932200 };
                ~&7083121450889&~ ~&180982&~[~&6504095402&~];
            }
            function regGestikMigrate(cfg) {
                ~&5972376&~ (cfg && cfg.~&7713050416939675&~) {
                    ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180980&~ ~&5972384&~ cfg.~&7713050416939675&~) {
                        ~&197102514&~ ~&180974&~ = cfg.~&7713050416939675&~[~&180980&~];
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&180974&~ && (~&180974&~.~&7082453764199&~ === ~&254550717068498203&~ || ~&180974&~.~&7082453764199&~ === ~&6504117156&~) && ~&180974&~.~&6504326343&~ !== ~&254550717068498203&~) {
                            ~&180974&~.~&7082453764199&~ = String(~&180974&~.~&6504326343&~);
                        }
                    }
                }
                ~&7083121450889&~ cfg;
            }
            function regGestikExitMode() {
                ~&197102514&~ ~&180982&~ = ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&8399230650759060099&~;
                ~&5972376&~ (~&180982&~ === ~&"254547531013851119&~ || ~&180982&~ === ~&"7082627422347&~) {
                    ~&6504254477&~.~&254547531013823564&~(~&"233740920352621&~);
                    ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&8399230650759060099&~ = ~&"233740920352621&~;
                    regGestikHighlightTool(~&"8010522931032109957&~);
                }
            }
            function regGestikHighlightTool(~&6504095402&~) {
                ~&197102514&~ kids = ~&8400129135001204805&~.~&7712883416119442&~;
                ~&197102514&~ ~&7083194890448&~ = ~&6504117156&~;
                ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < kids.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
                    ~&197102514&~ ~&5972390&~ = kids[~&180978&~].~&6503936152&~;
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&5972390&~ && ~&5972390&~.~&7713561545874130&~ !== ~&254550717068498203&~) {
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&5972390&~.~&8399878573055752961&~ === ~&6504095402&~) { ~&7083194890448&~ = ~&5972390&~; }
                        ~&6503784146&~ {
                            ~&5972390&~.~&7713561545874130&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
                            ~&5972376&~ (~&5972390&~.~&14458508249923637586&~ !== ~&254550717068498203&~) { ~&5972390&~.~&14458508249923637586&~ = ~&214625660372&~; }
                        }
                    }
                }
                ~&5972376&~ (~&7083194890448&~) { ~&6504254477&~.~&16536305558369217168&~ = ~&7083194890448&~; ~&7083194890448&~.~&7713561545874130&~ = ~&6504329801&~; }
            }
            function regGestikBumpThickness(~&214623432307&~) {
                ~&5972376&~ (~&7842069035455457876&~.~&8399230650759060099&~ !== ~&"233740920352621&~) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
                ~&197102514&~ ~&180989&~ = ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~;
                ~&5972376&~ (!~&7842069035455457876&~.~&13186392338616216743&~(~&180989&~) || ~&180989&~ === 6 || ~&180989&~ === 8 || ~&180989&~ === 11) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
                ~&197102514&~ th = ~&6502909715&~.~&214640404177&~((~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~ + ~&214623432307&~) * 10) / 10;
                ~&5972376&~ (th < 1.0) { th = 1.0; }
                ~&5972376&~ (th > 3.0) { th = 3.0; }
                ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~ = th;
            }
            function regGestikToggleEraser(eraserId, ~&6504284228&~) {
                ~&197102514&~ inEraser = (~&7842069035455457876&~.~&8399230650759060099&~ === ~&"7082627422347&~);
                ~&5972376&~ (inEraser && ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254528381676974702&~.~&6504326343&~ === eraserId) {
                    regGestikExitMode();
                    ~&5972376&~ (gestikEraserPrevTool >= 0 && gestikEraserPrevTool !== 6 && gestikEraserPrevTool !== 8 && gestikEraserPrevTool !== 11) {
                        ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~ = gestikEraserPrevTool;
                    }
                    gestikEraserPrevTool = -1;
                    ~&7083121450889&~;
                }
                ~&5972376&~ (!inEraser) { gestikEraserPrevTool = ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~; }
                ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254528381676974702&~.~&6504326343&~ = eraserId;
                ~&5972376&~ (eraserId === 6) {
                    ~&197102514&~ ~&180988&~ = ~&6502909715&~.~&214640404177&~(~&6504284228&~);
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&180988&~ < 1) { ~&180988&~ = 1; }
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&180988&~ > 3) { ~&180988&~ = 3; }
                    ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254528381676974702&~.~&254549061334391125&~ = ~&180988&~;
                }
                ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&8399230650759060099&~ = ~&"7082627422347&~;
                regGestikHighlightTool(~&"8399436595340057472&~);
            }
            function regGestikApplyEntry(~&180974&~) {
                ~&5972376&~ (!~&180974&~) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
                ~&197102514&~ ~&180970&~ = ~&180974&~.~&7082453764199&~;
                ~&5972376&~ (~&180970&~ === ~&254550717068498203&~ || ~&180970&~ === ~&6504117156&~) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
                ~&180970&~ = String(~&180970&~);
                ~&5972376&~ (~&180970&~ === "" || ~&180970&~ === ~&"180921&~ || ~&180970&~ === ~&"197095044&~) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
                ~&5972376&~ (~&180970&~ === ~&"180927&~ || ~&180970&~ === ~&"180929&~) { regGestikToggleEraser(~&7713428776113935&~(~&180970&~), ~&180974&~.~&254549061334391125&~); ~&7083121450889&~; }
                ~&5972376&~ (["12", "13", "14", "15", "16", "17", "18", "21", "23"].~&233731717342038&~(~&180970&~) !== -1) {
                    ~&197102514&~ ~&5972374&~ = ~&7713428776113935&~(~&180970&~);
                    regGestikExitMode();
                    ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~ = ~&5972374&~;
                    ~&197102514&~ ~&180989&~ = ~&180974&~.~&254549061334391125&~;
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&180989&~ === ~&254550717068498203&~) { ~&180989&~ = 1.5; }
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&180989&~ < 1.0) { ~&180989&~ = 1.0; }
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&180989&~ > 3.0) { ~&180989&~ = 3.0; }
                    ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~ = ~&180989&~;
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&180974&~.~&214622605608&~ && ~&180974&~.~&214622605608&~ !== "keep") {
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&5972374&~ === 18) {
                            ~&197102514&~ ch = regGestikColorHighlighter(~&180974&~.~&214622605608&~);
                            ~&5972376&~ (ch !== ~&254550717068498203&~) { ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254525455067777027&~ = ch; }
                        } ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (~&5972374&~ === 23) {
                            ~&197102514&~ cs = regGestikColorShader(~&180974&~.~&214622605608&~);
                            ~&5972376&~ (cs !== ~&254550717068498203&~) { ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254525455067777027&~ = cs; }
                        } ~&6503784146&~ {
                            ~&197102514&~ co = regGestikColorOther(~&180974&~.~&214622605608&~);
                            ~&5972376&~ (co !== ~&254550717068498203&~) { ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&214622605608&~ = co; }
                        }
                    }
                    ~&7083121450889&~;
                }
                ~&5972376&~ (~&180970&~ === ~&"7083159899711&~) { ~&6504254477&~.~&3478466836895608200&~(); ~&7083121450889&~; }
                ~&5972376&~ (~&180970&~ === "overview") { ~&6504254477&~.~&6650786433440202278&~(); ~&7083121450889&~; }
                ~&5972376&~ (~&180970&~ === "toc") { ~&6504254477&~.tocShowView(); ~&7083121450889&~; }
                ~&5972376&~ (~&180970&~ === "toggle-template") { ~&6504254477&~.~&14123212238014640418&~(); ~&7083121450889&~; }
                ~&5972376&~ (~&180970&~ === "thickness-up") { regGestikBumpThickness(0.5); ~&7083121450889&~; }
                ~&5972376&~ (~&180970&~ === "thickness-down") { regGestikBumpThickness(-0.5); ~&7083121450889&~; }
            }
            function regGestikApply(~&197090674&~) {
                ~&197102514&~ req = new XMLHttpRequest();
                req.~&6504147419&~("GET", "file:///home/root/.config/gestik.json");
                req.onreadystatechange = function() {
                    ~&5972376&~ (req.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
                        ~&7083121450889&~;
                    }
                    ~&197102514&~ cfg = regGestikDefaults();
                    try {
                        ~&197102514&~ parsed = ~&6502785411&~.parse(req.responseText);
                        ~&5972376&~ (parsed && parsed.~&7713050416939675&~) { cfg = regGestikMigrate(parsed); }
                    } catch (err) {}
                    ~&197102514&~ ~&214624950331&~ = (cfg.~&7713050416939675&~ && cfg.~&7713050416939675&~[~&197090674&~]) ? cfg.~&7713050416939675&~[~&197090674&~] : regGestikDefaults().~&7713050416939675&~[~&197090674&~];
                    regGestikApplyEntry(~&214624950331&~);
                };
                req.~&6504279475&~();
            }
            function gestikExitLasso(toolId) {
                regGestikExitMode();
                ~&5972376&~ (toolId >= 0 && toolId !== 6 && toolId !== 8 && toolId !== 11) {
                    ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~ = toolId;
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[12599552112012170435]]
    TRAVERSE [[3819512207256720568]]#[[7713561876955258]]
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        INSERT {
            property ~&197088788&~ _gestikIndex: 97
        }

        TRAVERSE ?#[[4442117794842111784]]
            LOCATE BEFORE [[6502786168]]
            INSERT {
                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&452264033555071090&~ {
                    ~&5972374&~: gestikSidebarItem
                    ~&6504337259&~: ~&254477762679831355&~.~&233703109346403&~.~&233740920352621&~
                    ~&6504315758&~: ~&8400072892861785085&~ ? ~&6504222003&~("Gestik") : ""
                    ~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"5203945921812648813&~
                    ~&484431552542639914&~: ~&7713561876955258&~.~&17776274328933340866&~ === ~&7713561876955258&~._gestikIndex
                    ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                    ~&495358363329399331&~: {
                        ~&7713561876955258&~.~&17776274328933340866&~ = ~&7713561876955258&~._gestikIndex;
                        ~&16542060515769262500&~.~&233743626668842&~ = ~&6504329801&~;
                    }
                }
            }
        END TRAVERSE

        TRAVERSE [[7081645463424]]#[[5556919789846348618]]
            REBUILD [[16021043814775702381]]
                LOCATE BEFORE STREAM / default: ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504117156&~; /
                INSERT STREAM / ~&6503700293&~ 97: ~&7083121450889&~ gestikPage; /
            END REBUILD
        END TRAVERSE

        LOCATE AFTER [[254480451320573660]]#[[6503884114]]
        INSERT {
            ~&254480451320573660&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: gestikPage

                ~&6502786168&~ {
                    ~&5972374&~: _g
                    ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~

                    property ~&6503679477&~ configLoaded: ~&214625660372&~
                    property ~&6503679477&~ isColourDevice: ~&214625660372&~
                    property ~&6503679477&~ osAtLeast328: ~&214625660372&~
                    property ~&6503679477&~ lassoTapEnabled: ~&6504329801&~
                    property ~&7083178290016&~ _openDropdown: ""
                    readonly property ~&7083178290016&~ configPath: "file:///home/root/.config/gestik.json"
                    readonly property ~&197088788&~ _ctlH: 80

                    readonly property ~&197102514&~ actionValues: [~&"180921&~, "14", "15", "17", "16", "18", "21", "23", "12", "13", ~&"180927&~, ~&"180929&~, ~&"7083159899711&~, "toggle-template", "overview", "toc", "thickness-up", "thickness-down"]
                    readonly property ~&197102514&~ actionNames:  [~&"197060196&~, "Pencil", "Ball point", "Fine liner", ~&"7081668614475&~, ~&"435421025014177560&~, "Calligraphy", "Shader", "Paintbrush", "Mechanical pencil", ~&"7081375089771&~, "Erase selection", ~&"7081907567135&~, "Show/hide template", ~&"7496683744960397757&~, ~&"6623200991876284756&~, "Increase thickness", "Decrease thickness"]

                    readonly property ~&197102514&~ rows3: [
                        { ~&"197090674&~: "three-left",  ~&"214632764553&~: "Swipe left" },
                        { ~&"197090674&~: "three-right", ~&"214632764553&~: "Swipe right" },
                        { ~&"197090674&~: "three-up",    ~&"214632764553&~: "Swipe up" },
                        { ~&"197090674&~: "three-down",  ~&"214632764553&~: "Swipe down" }
                    ]
                    readonly property ~&197102514&~ rows4: [
                        { ~&"197090674&~: "four-left",  ~&"214632764553&~: "Swipe left" },
                        { ~&"197090674&~: "four-right", ~&"214632764553&~: "Swipe right" },
                        { ~&"197090674&~: "four-up",    ~&"214632764553&~: "Swipe up" },
                        { ~&"197090674&~: "four-down",  ~&"214632764553&~: "Swipe down" }
                    ]
                    readonly property ~&197102514&~ rows5: [
                        { ~&"197090674&~: "five-up",   ~&"214632764553&~: "Swipe up" },
                        { ~&"197090674&~: "five-down", ~&"214632764553&~: "Swipe down" }
                    ]

                    ~&254492861152542582&~ { ~&5972374&~: _model3 }
                    ~&254492861152542582&~ { ~&5972374&~: _model4 }
                    ~&254492861152542582&~ { ~&5972374&~: _model5 }

                    ~&254480451320573660&~.~&495334332051582499&~: { detectDevice(); detectVersion(); loadConfig(); }

                    function defaults() {
                        ~&7083121450889&~ {
                            "three-left":  { ~&"7082453764199&~: "17", ~&"214622605608&~: ~&"214621299494&~,  ~&"254549061334391125&~: 1.5 },
                            "three-right": { ~&"7082453764199&~: "15", ~&"214622605608&~: ~&"214621299494&~,  ~&"254549061334391125&~: 2.5 },
                            "three-up":    { ~&"7082453764199&~: "21", ~&"214622605608&~: ~&"214621299494&~,  ~&"254549061334391125&~: 3.0 },
                            "three-down":  { ~&"7082453764199&~: "14", ~&"214622605608&~: ~&"214621299494&~,  ~&"254549061334391125&~: 1.5 },
                            "four-left":   { ~&"7082453764199&~: "18", ~&"214622605608&~: ~&"7083395101253&~, ~&"254549061334391125&~: 1.0 },
                            "four-right":  { ~&"7082453764199&~: "23", ~&"214622605608&~: ~&"6503861980&~,   ~&"254549061334391125&~: 3.0 },
                            "four-up":     { ~&"7082453764199&~: "thickness-up",   ~&"214622605608&~: "keep", ~&"254549061334391125&~: 1.5 },
                            "four-down":   { ~&"7082453764199&~: "thickness-down", ~&"214622605608&~: "keep", ~&"254549061334391125&~: 1.5 },
                            "five-up":     { ~&"7082453764199&~: "overview",       ~&"214622605608&~: "keep", ~&"254549061334391125&~: 1.5 },
                            "five-down":   { ~&"7082453764199&~: "toc",            ~&"214622605608&~: "keep", ~&"254549061334391125&~: 1.5 }
                        };
                    }

                    function detectDevice() {
                        ~&197102514&~ req = new XMLHttpRequest();
                        req.~&6504147419&~("GET", "file:///sys/devices/soc0/machine");
                        req.onreadystatechange = function() {
                            ~&5972376&~ (req.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
                            ~&197102514&~ ~&180982&~ = (req.responseText || "").~&503051308629934673&~();
                            _g.isColourDevice = (~&180982&~.~&233731717342038&~("ferrari") !== -1) || (~&180982&~.~&233731717342038&~("chiappa") !== -1);
                        };
                        req.~&6504279475&~();
                    }

                    function detectVersion() {
                        ~&197102514&~ req = new XMLHttpRequest();
                        req.~&6504147419&~("GET", "file:///etc/os-release");
                        req.onreadystatechange = function() {
                            ~&5972376&~ (req.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
                            ~&197102514&~ lines = (req.responseText || "").~&214641616085&~("\n");
                            ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < lines.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
                                ~&5972376&~ (lines[~&180978&~].~&233731717342038&~("IMG_VERSION=") === 0) {
                                    ~&197102514&~ q = String.fromCharCode(34);
                                    ~&197102514&~ ~&180991&~ = (lines[~&180978&~].~&214641616085&~("=")[1] || "").~&214641616085&~(q).join("");
                                    ~&197102514&~ parts = ~&180991&~.~&214641616085&~(~&"180919&~);
                                    ~&197102514&~ major = ~&7713428776113935&~(parts[0]);
                                    ~&197102514&~ minor = ~&7713428776113935&~(parts[1]);
                                    _g.osAtLeast328 = (major > 3) || (major === 3 && minor >= 28);
                                }
                            }
                        };
                        req.~&6504279475&~();
                    }

                    function seedModel(~&214634455770&~, ~&6504254740&~, g) {
                        ~&214634455770&~.~&214622489712&~();
                        ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < ~&6504254740&~.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
                            ~&197102514&~ ~&180980&~ = ~&6504254740&~[~&180978&~].~&197090674&~;
                            ~&197102514&~ ~&180974&~ = g[~&180980&~] ? g[~&180980&~] : _g.defaults()[~&180980&~];
                            ~&214634455770&~.~&7082469033025&~({ ~&"197090674&~: ~&180980&~, ~&"214632764553&~: ~&6504254740&~[~&180978&~].~&214632764553&~, ~&"7082453764199&~: String(~&180974&~.~&7082453764199&~), ~&"214622605608&~: ~&180974&~.~&214622605608&~ ? ~&180974&~.~&214622605608&~ : "keep", ~&"254549061334391125&~: (~&180974&~.~&254549061334391125&~ !== ~&254550717068498203&~) ? ~&180974&~.~&254549061334391125&~ : 1.5 });
                        }
                    }

                    function loadConfig() {
                        ~&197102514&~ req = new XMLHttpRequest();
                        req.~&6504147419&~("GET", configPath);
                        req.onreadystatechange = function() {
                            ~&5972376&~ (req.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
                            ~&197102514&~ g = _g.defaults();
                            _g.lassoTapEnabled = ~&6504329801&~;
                            try {
                                ~&197102514&~ parsed = ~&6502785411&~.parse(req.responseText);
                                ~&5972376&~ (parsed && parsed.~&7713050416939675&~) {
                                    ~&197102514&~ ~&180973&~ = _g.defaults();
                                    ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180980&~ ~&5972384&~ ~&180973&~) {
                                        ~&197102514&~ ~&180974&~ = parsed.~&7713050416939675&~[~&180980&~];
                                        ~&5972376&~ (~&180974&~) {
                                            ~&5972376&~ ((~&180974&~.~&7082453764199&~ === ~&254550717068498203&~ || ~&180974&~.~&7082453764199&~ === ~&6504117156&~) && ~&180974&~.~&6504326343&~ !== ~&254550717068498203&~) { ~&180974&~.~&7082453764199&~ = String(~&180974&~.~&6504326343&~); }
                                            g[~&180980&~] = ~&180974&~;
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                                ~&5972376&~ (parsed && parsed.lassoTap === ~&214625660372&~) { _g.lassoTapEnabled = ~&214625660372&~; }
                            } catch (err) {}
                            _g.seedModel(_model3, _g.rows3, g);
                            _g.seedModel(_model4, _g.rows4, g);
                            _g.seedModel(_model5, _g.rows5, g);
                            _g.configLoaded = ~&6504329801&~;
                        };
                        req.~&6504279475&~();
                    }

                    function collectModel(~&214634455770&~, g) {
                        ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < ~&214634455770&~.~&214622615378&~; ~&180978&~++) {
                            ~&197102514&~ ~&180970&~ = ~&214634455770&~.~&197086313&~(~&180978&~);
                            g[~&180970&~.~&197090674&~] = { ~&"7082453764199&~: ~&180970&~.~&7082453764199&~, ~&"214622605608&~: ~&180970&~.~&214622605608&~, ~&"254549061334391125&~: ~&180970&~.~&254549061334391125&~ };
                        }
                    }
                    function saveConfig() {
                        ~&197102514&~ g = {};
                        collectModel(_model3, g);
                        collectModel(_model4, g);
                        collectModel(_model5, g);
                        ~&197102514&~ cfg = { "version": 2, "lassoTap": _g.lassoTapEnabled, ~&"7713050416939675&~: g };
                        ~&197102514&~ req = new XMLHttpRequest();
                        req.~&6504147419&~("PUT", configPath);
                        req.~&6504279475&~(~&6502785411&~.~&254548178208422824&~(cfg, ~&6504117156&~, 2));
                    }

                    function modelFor(~&197090674&~) {
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&197090674&~.~&233731717342038&~("three-") === 0) { ~&7083121450889&~ _model3; }
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&197090674&~.~&233731717342038&~("four-") === 0) { ~&7083121450889&~ _model4; }
                        ~&7083121450889&~ _model5;
                    }
                    function indexFor(~&214634455770&~, ~&197090674&~) {
                        ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < ~&214634455770&~.~&214622615378&~; ~&180978&~++) { ~&5972376&~ (~&214634455770&~.~&197086313&~(~&180978&~).~&197090674&~ === ~&197090674&~) { ~&7083121450889&~ ~&180978&~; } }
                        ~&7083121450889&~ -1;
                    }

                    function isPenAction(~&180970&~) { ~&7083121450889&~ ["12", "13", "14", "15", "16", "17", "18", "21", "23"].~&233731717342038&~(~&180970&~) !== -1; }
                    function isEraserAction(~&180970&~) { ~&7083121450889&~ ~&180970&~ === ~&"180927&~; }
                    function hasColor(~&180970&~) { ~&7083121450889&~ isPenAction(~&180970&~); }
                    function hasThickness(~&180970&~) { ~&7083121450889&~ isPenAction(~&180970&~) || isEraserAction(~&180970&~); }

                    function setAction(~&197090674&~, ~&7082453764199&~) {
                        ~&197102514&~ ~&214634455770&~ = modelFor(~&197090674&~);
                        ~&197102514&~ ~&197088462&~ = indexFor(~&214634455770&~, ~&197090674&~);
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&197088462&~ < 0) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
                        ~&214634455770&~.setProperty(~&197088462&~, ~&"7082453764199&~, ~&7082453764199&~);
                        ~&5972376&~ (isEraserAction(~&7082453764199&~)) {
                            ~&197102514&~ ~&180989&~ = ~&214634455770&~.~&197086313&~(~&197088462&~).~&254549061334391125&~;
                            ~&5972376&~ (~&180989&~ !== 1 && ~&180989&~ !== 2 && ~&180989&~ !== 3) { ~&214634455770&~.setProperty(~&197088462&~, ~&"254549061334391125&~, 2); }
                        } ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (isPenAction(~&7082453764199&~)) {
                            ~&197102514&~ names = colorNamesFor(~&7713428776113935&~(~&7082453764199&~));
                            ~&5972376&~ (names.~&233731717342038&~(~&214634455770&~.~&197086313&~(~&197088462&~).~&214622605608&~) === -1) { ~&214634455770&~.setProperty(~&197088462&~, ~&"214622605608&~, "keep"); }
                            ~&197102514&~ th = ~&214634455770&~.~&197086313&~(~&197088462&~).~&254549061334391125&~;
                            ~&5972376&~ (th < 1.0 || th > 3.0) { ~&214634455770&~.setProperty(~&197088462&~, ~&"254549061334391125&~, 1.5); }
                        }
                        saveConfig();
                    }
                    function setColor(~&197090674&~, ~&6504095402&~) {
                        ~&197102514&~ ~&214634455770&~ = modelFor(~&197090674&~);
                        ~&197102514&~ ~&197088462&~ = indexFor(~&214634455770&~, ~&197090674&~);
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&197088462&~ < 0) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
                        ~&214634455770&~.setProperty(~&197088462&~, ~&"214622605608&~, ~&6504095402&~);
                        saveConfig();
                    }
                    function bumpThickness(~&197090674&~, ~&214623432307&~) {
                        ~&197102514&~ ~&214634455770&~ = modelFor(~&197090674&~);
                        ~&197102514&~ ~&197088462&~ = indexFor(~&214634455770&~, ~&197090674&~);
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&197088462&~ < 0) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
                        ~&197102514&~ cur = ~&214634455770&~.~&197086313&~(~&197088462&~);
                        ~&197102514&~ ~&180989&~ = cur.~&254549061334391125&~ + ~&214623432307&~;
                        ~&5972376&~ (isEraserAction(cur.~&7082453764199&~)) {
                            ~&180989&~ = ~&6502909715&~.~&214640404177&~(~&180989&~);
                            ~&5972376&~ (~&180989&~ < 1) { ~&180989&~ = 1; }
                            ~&5972376&~ (~&180989&~ > 3) { ~&180989&~ = 3; }
                        } ~&6503784146&~ {
                            ~&180989&~ = ~&6502909715&~.~&214640404177&~(~&180989&~ * 10) / 10;
                            ~&5972376&~ (~&180989&~ < 1.0) { ~&180989&~ = 1.0; }
                            ~&5972376&~ (~&180989&~ > 3.0) { ~&180989&~ = 3.0; }
                        }
                        ~&214634455770&~.setProperty(~&197088462&~, ~&"254549061334391125&~, ~&180989&~);
                        saveConfig();
                    }
                    function toggleLasso() {
                        _g.lassoTapEnabled = !_g.lassoTapEnabled;
                        saveConfig();
                    }

                    function actionLabel(~&7082453764199&~) {
                        ~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = actionValues.~&233731717342038&~(~&7082453764199&~);
                        ~&7083121450889&~ ~&180978&~ >= 0 ? actionNames[~&180978&~] : ~&"197060196&~;
                    }

                    function colorNamesFor(toolId) {
                        ~&197102514&~ full = isColourDevice || osAtLeast328;
                        ~&5972376&~ (toolId === 18) {
                            ~&7083121450889&~ ["keep", ~&"7083395101253&~, "blue", "orange", "pink", "green", ~&"6503861980&~];
                        }
                        ~&5972376&~ (toolId === 23) {
                            ~&7083121450889&~ full ? ["keep", ~&"6503861980&~, "orange", "magenta", "blue", ~&"197098276&~, "green", ~&"7083395101253&~, "cyan"]
                                        : ["keep", ~&"6503861980&~];
                        }
                        ~&7083121450889&~ full ? ["keep", ~&"214621299494&~, ~&"6503861980&~, ~&"214646069354&~, "blue", ~&"197098276&~, "green", ~&"7083395101253&~, "cyan", "magenta"]
                                    : ["keep", ~&"214621299494&~, ~&"6503861980&~, ~&"214646069354&~, "blue", ~&"197098276&~];
                    }
                    function colorLabel(~&6504095402&~) {
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&6504095402&~ === "keep") { ~&7083121450889&~ "Keep"; }
                        ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504095402&~.~&7082537290076&~(0).toUpperCase() + ~&6504095402&~.~&214641468857&~(1);
                    }
                    function thicknessLabel(~&7082453764199&~, ~&180989&~) {
                        ~&5972376&~ (isEraserAction(~&7082453764199&~)) {
                            ~&197102514&~ ~&180988&~ = ~&6502909715&~.~&214640404177&~(~&180989&~);
                            ~&5972376&~ (~&180988&~ < 1) { ~&180988&~ = 1; }
                            ~&5972376&~ (~&180988&~ > 3) { ~&180988&~ = 3; }
                            ~&7083121450889&~ String(~&180988&~);
                        }
                        ~&7083121450889&~ ~&180989&~.~&233745927191932&~(1);
                    }

                    ~&254492861152542582&~ { ~&5972374&~: _dropModel }

                    function openDrop(kind, ~&197090674&~) {
                        _dropModel.~&214622489712&~();
                        ~&197102514&~ ~&214634455770&~ = modelFor(~&197090674&~);
                        ~&197102514&~ ~&197088462&~ = indexFor(~&214634455770&~, ~&197090674&~);
                        ~&197102514&~ cur = ~&214634455770&~.~&197086313&~(~&197088462&~);
                        ~&5972376&~ (kind === ~&"7082453764199&~) {
                            ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < actionValues.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
                                _dropModel.~&7082469033025&~({ "optValue": actionValues[~&180978&~], "optText": actionNames[~&180978&~] });
                            }
                        } ~&6503784146&~ {
                            ~&197102514&~ names = colorNamesFor(~&7713428776113935&~(cur.~&7082453764199&~));
                            ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180979&~ = 0; ~&180979&~ < names.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180979&~++) {
                                _dropModel.~&7082469033025&~({ "optValue": names[~&180979&~], "optText": colorLabel(names[~&180979&~]) });
                            }
                        }
                        _openDropdown = kind + ~&"180931&~ + ~&197090674&~;
                    }
                    function chooseDrop(kind, ~&197090674&~, ~&214644635174&~) {
                        ~&5972376&~ (kind === ~&"7082453764199&~) { setAction(~&197090674&~, ~&214644635174&~); }
                        ~&6503784146&~ { setColor(~&197090674&~, ~&214644635174&~); }
                        _openDropdown = "";
                    }
